rulings.Case Title: CHAMBERLIN VS SF UNIFIED SCHOOL
rulings.Calendar Matter: DEMURRER
rulings.Rulings: DEMURRER OVER RULED AS TO 1ST C/A. BREACH OF CONTRACT - SCHOOL DISTRICT FAILURE TO RESPOND TO WRITTEN GRIEVENCE SUFFICIENT TO PROVIDE BASIS FOR ALLEGATION OF EXHAUSTION OF ADMINISTRATIVE REMEDY. DEMURRER TO 2ND C/A RECKLESS ENDANGERMENT SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. See Halliman v. LA Unified School Dist., 163 Cal.App.3d 46 (1984). DEMURRER TO 3RD C/A SUSTAINED W/OUT LEAVE TO AMEND. SCHOOL DISTRICT AND OFFICIAL NOT LIABLE UNDER 42 USC 1983 SEE Kirchmann v. Lake Elsinore Unified Sch. Dist., 83 Cal.App.4th (1098) (PB)

rulings.Rulings: PETITION FOR WRIT DENIED - EVIDENCE SUPPORTS FINDING THAT OFFICER CORRECTLY PROVIDED PETITIONER WITH A CHOICE OF BREACH OR BLOOD TEST FOR ALCOHOL CONSUMTION. (PB)

rulings.Calendar Matter: Not Of Hearing; Demurrer To Complaint And Motion To Dismiss; Mp&As; Decl Of Maretta Ward
rulings.Rulings: SUSTAIN DEMURRER WITH LEAVE TO AMEND TO ALLEGE PERIOD OF REPRESENTATION BY JUDGE WHILE AN ATTORNEY TIME OF DISCOVERY AND COMPLIANCE WITH ALL REQUIREMENT OF CCP170.1 AND 170.3. ACTION STAYED PENDING RESOLUTION OF SACRAMENTO CASE. MOTION TO STRIKE DENIED. (CW)
